=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable anyUnknownInErrorContext for this line" ===

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable anyUnknownInErrorContext for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Remove the Effect.gen, and keep the body" ===

--- file:///.src/anyUnknownInErrorContext.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics anyUnknownInErrorContext:warning
import { Effect, Layer } from "effect"

export const withUnknownContext = Effect.asVoid(Effect.context<unknown>())

export const withAnyContext = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.context<any>()
})

export const withAnyFailure = Effect.gen(function*() {
  return yield* Effect.fail<any>(42)
})

export const withUnknownFailure = Effect.gen(function*() {
  return yield* Effect.fail<unknown>(42)
})

export const hasBothAnyUnknown = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.context<unknown>()
  return yield* Effect.fail<any>(42)
})

export const thisIsFine: Effect.Effect<void, number> = Effect.fail<any>(42) as any

export function explicitAny(_a: Effect.Effect<void, number, any>) {
  return Effect.succeed(42)
}

export const thisIsAlsoFine: Effect.Effect<void, number, any> = Effect.succeed(42)

export class Test {
  a: Effect.Effect<void, number, any> = Effect.succeed(42)
}

const effectUnkown = Effect.context<unknown>()
const layerUnknown = Layer.effectDiscard(effectUnkown)
export const composedLayerUnknown = Layer.empty.pipe(Layer.provide(layerUnknown))

skipped by default

=== [D5] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for entire file" ===

=== [D5] Fix 2: "Remove the Effect.gen, and keep the body" ===

--- file:///.src/anyUnknownInErrorContext.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics anyUnknownInErrorContext:warning
import { Effect, Layer } from "effect"

export const withUnknownContext = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.context<unknown>()
})

export const withAnyContext = Effect.asVoid(Effect.context<any>())

export const withAnyFailure = Effect.gen(function*() {
  return yield* Effect.fail<any>(42)
})

export const withUnknownFailure = Effect.gen(function*() {
  return yield* Effect.fail<unknown>(42)
})

export const hasBothAnyUnknown = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.context<unknown>()
  return yield* Effect.fail<any>(42)
})

export const thisIsFine: Effect.Effect<void, number> = Effect.fail<any>(42) as any

export function explicitAny(_a: Effect.Effect<void, number, any>) {
  return Effect.succeed(42)
}

export const thisIsAlsoFine: Effect.Effect<void, number, any> = Effect.succeed(42)

export class Test {
  a: Effect.Effect<void, number, any> = Effect.succeed(42)
}

const effectUnkown = Effect.context<unknown>()
const layerUnknown = Layer.effectDiscard(effectUnkown)
export const composedLayerUnknown = Layer.empty.pipe(Layer.provide(layerUnknown))

=== [D8] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D8] Fix 2: "Remove the Effect.gen, and keep the body" ===

--- file:///.src/anyUnknownInErrorContext.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics anyUnknownInErrorContext:warning
import { Effect, Layer } from "effect"

export const withUnknownContext = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.context<unknown>()
})

export const withAnyContext = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.context<any>()
})

export const withAnyFailure = Effect.fail<any>(42)

export const withUnknownFailure = Effect.gen(function*() {
  return yield* Effect.fail<unknown>(42)
})

export const hasBothAnyUnknown = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.context<unknown>()
  return yield* Effect.fail<any>(42)
})

export const thisIsFine: Effect.Effect<void, number> = Effect.fail<any>(42) as any

export function explicitAny(_a: Effect.Effect<void, number, any>) {
  return Effect.succeed(42)
}

export const thisIsAlsoFine: Effect.Effect<void, number, any> = Effect.succeed(42)

export class Test {
  a: Effect.Effect<void, number, any> = Effect.succeed(42)
}

const effectUnkown = Effect.context<unknown>()
const layerUnknown = Layer.effectDiscard(effectUnkown)
export const composedLayerUnknown = Layer.empty.pipe(Layer.provide(layerUnknown))

skipped by default

skipped by default

=== [D11] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D11] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D11] Fix 2: "Remove the Effect.gen, and keep the body" ===

--- file:///.src/anyUnknownInErrorContext.ts ---
// @effect-diagnostics anyUnknownInErrorContext:warning
import { Effect, Layer } from "effect"

export const withUnknownContext = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.context<unknown>()
})

export const withAnyContext = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.context<any>()
})

export const withAnyFailure = Effect.gen(function*() {
  return yield* Effect.fail<any>(42)
})

export const withUnknownFailure = Effect.fail<unknown>(42)

export const hasBothAnyUnknown = Effect.gen(function*() {
  yield* Effect.context<unknown>()
  return yield* Effect.fail<any>(42)
})

export const thisIsFine: Effect.Effect<void, number> = Effect.fail<any>(42) as any

export function explicitAny(_a: Effect.Effect<void, number, any>) {
  return Effect.succeed(42)
}

export const thisIsAlsoFine: Effect.Effect<void, number, any> = Effect.succeed(42)

export class Test {
  a: Effect.Effect<void, number, any> = Effect.succeed(42)
}

const effectUnkown = Effect.context<unknown>()
const layerUnknown = Layer.effectDiscard(effectUnkown)
export const composedLayerUnknown = Layer.empty.pipe(Layer.provide(layerUnknown))
